summary: Blazing Jerry and a scorching "Rider" turn this triple‑Playing in the Band set into a Primo performance, though the recording source isn’t described.
review: The reviewer raves about Jerry’s blistering guitar work and an on‑fire rendition of "The Rider," highlighting three appearances of "Playing in the Band" as a show‑stopping moment. No technical details are given, so the audio quality is assumed decent but remains unspecified.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises the musical performance heavily; lack of recording‑quality details limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on soundboard, audience mix, clarity or issues; assumed listenable based on overall praise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes three separate "Playing in the Band" moments and a fiery "Rider," suggesting an energetic, high‑flow performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as blistering and on fire; top‑level guitar work.
